title: sorbus latifolia var. parumlobata
intro: Sorbus latifolia var. parumlobata, also known as the Chinese rowan or mountain ash, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the mountainous regions of China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Sorbus latifolia var. parumlobata include reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as acting as an antioxidant to protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used in the form of tea, decoctions, or infusions, and may also be formulated into capsules or tinctures for oral consumption.
